examples.title: Array Sum Calculation
examples.description: Calculates sum of all elements in an array
examples.explanation: Uses a for loop to iterate through each array element and accumulate the sum in the sum variable.

examples.title: Switch Case Menu
examples.explanation: Demonstrates switch usage with multiple cases, break statements, and default case handling.

examples.title: 2D Array Matrix Addition
examples.description: Adds two 3x3 matrices using nested loops
examples.explanation: Uses nested for loops - outer for rows, inner for columns. Each element of A and B are added and stored in C.

examples.title: Prime Number Checker (While Loop)
examples.description: Checks if a number is prime using while loop
examples.explanation: Uses while loop to check divisibility up to square root of number. If no divisor found, it's prime.

examples.title: Pattern Generation using Nested Loops
examples.description: Generates a pyramid pattern using nested loops
examples.explanation: Three nested loops: outer controls rows, first inner prints spaces for alignment, second inner prints stars. Pattern expands as rows increase.
